hypothesis: A provider-neutral live-evaluation contract can emit schema-valid sanitized public rows with matched budgets, fixture replay integrity, and task-clustered bootstrap intervals without contacting a live provider.

controls.description: Default executor is the deterministic fixture adapter; live adapters require explicit opt-in and are unused in this smoke.
Planned calls above the frozen ceiling refuse dispatch before any executor call.
Raw provider fields are blocked from public rows.

gates.criterion: Every smoke row validates against the frozen public result schema.
The smoke bundle uses only the fixture adapter and never imports a provider SDK.
All rows pass sanitization, budget, and fixture replay integrity receipts.
Task-clustered bootstrap summaries are reproducible from frozen public rows.
